```{=html}
<details class="db-row" id="go">
  <summary class="db-row-summary">
    <span class="db-row-name">Go</span>
    <span class="db-row-icon" aria-hidden="true">▸</span>
  </summary>
  <div class="db-row-compact">
    <div class="db-row-bar"><div class="seg tactics" style="width:70%" title="Taktik: 70%"></div><div class="seg physical" style="width:5%" title="Physis: 5%"></div><div class="seg skill" style="width:25%" title="Skill: 25%"></div></div>
    <div class="db-row-values"><span class="db-chip"><span class="db-chip-dot tactics"></span>T 70</span><span class="db-chip"><span class="db-chip-dot physical"></span>P 5</span><span class="db-chip"><span class="db-chip-dot skill"></span>Sk 25</span></div>
  </div>
  <details class="db-row-info">
    <summary class="db-row-info-summary">Details und Paarvergleich</summary>
    <div class="db-row-detail">
      <p class="sport-meta">19×19 · 1 gegen 1</p>
      <p class="sport-rationale">Das taktiklastigste Profil der gesamten Datenbank, noch vor Schach. Strategisches Denken über das ganze Brett entscheidet praktisch immer. Skill (Mustererkennung) liegt auf Rang zwei mit Abstand. Physis ist nur als Konzentrationsausdauer relevant. Material existiert nicht als Faktor.</p>
      <details class="ahp-details">
        <summary>Paarvergleichsmatrix anzeigen</summary>
        <div class="ahp-content">
          <p class="ahp-label">Paarurteile auf der verankerten Skala. Ein Eintrag gibt an, wie viel häufiger die Komponente der Zeile statt der Spalte über den Ausgang entscheidet:</p>
          <table class="ahp-matrix-table"><thead><tr><th></th><th>T</th><th>P</th><th>Sk</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><th>T</th><td class="diag">1</td><td class="gt">9</td><td class="gt">3</td></tr>
<tr><th>P</th><td class="lt">1/9</td><td class="diag">1</td><td class="lt">1/4</td></tr>
<tr><th>Sk</th><td class="lt">1/3</td><td class="gt">4</td><td class="diag">1</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
          <p class="ahp-meta">Material ausgeschlossen, daher 3×3-Vergleich: Steine und Brett sind standardisiert.</p>
          <p class="ahp-cr">Consistency Ratio: <span class="cr-ok">0.008</span> <span class="cr-label">(konsistent)</span></p>
          <div class="sub-components-block"><p class="sub-components-title">Sub-Komponenten</p><div class="sub-row"><span class="sub-label">Skill</span><div class="sub-bars"><div class="sub-bar"><span class="sub-bar-label">motorisch</span><div class="sub-bar-fill"><div class="sub-bar-inner skill-motor" style="width:8%"></div></div><span class="sub-bar-val">2</span></div><div class="sub-bar"><span class="sub-bar-label">kognitiv</span><div class="sub-bar-fill"><div class="sub-bar-inner skill-cogn" style="width:88%"></div></div><span class="sub-bar-val">22</span></div></div></div><div class="sub-row"><span class="sub-label">Physis</span><div class="sub-bars"><div class="sub-bar"><span class="sub-bar-label">Ausdauer</span><div class="sub-bar-fill"><div class="sub-bar-inner phys-aus" style="width:80%"></div></div><span class="sub-bar-val">4</span></div><div class="sub-bar"><span class="sub-bar-label">Kraft</span><div class="sub-bar-fill"><div class="sub-bar-inner phys-kraft" style="width:20%"></div></div><span class="sub-bar-val">1</span></div></div></div><p class="sub-meta">Anteile in Prozent der Gesamtsumme. Skill ist in motorische (Bewegungspräzision) und kognitive (Mustererkennung, Entscheidung) Komponenten aufgeteilt; Physis in Ausdauer, Kraft und Schnelligkeit.</p></div>
        </div>
      </details>
    </div>
  </details>
</details>










  </div>

  <section id="vergleich">
  <h2>Vergleich aller Sportarten</h2>

  <h3>Strukturraum als 3D-Netz</h3>
  <p>Die folgende Karte zeigt alle bewerteten Sportarten als Punkte in einer flachen Anordnung. Die Distanzen entstammen einer mehrdimensionalen Skalierung (MDS) auf Basis des verfeinerten <strong>7-dimensionalen Profils</strong>: Skill ist in motorisches und kognitives Können aufgespalten, Physis in Ausdauer, Kraft und Schnelligkeit. Taktik und Material bleiben unverteilt. Die Achsen haben keine Bedeutung; allein die Abstände zwischen den Punkten zählen. Beim Projizieren der echten 7D-Struktur auf 2D gehen etwa 18% der Distanzinformation verloren — die exakten Distanzen finden sich in der Vergleichstabelle weiter unten.</p>

<p>Zwölf strukturelle Cluster sind durch farbig getönte Hüllen hervorgehoben (Verbindungslinie zwischen Sportarten markiert Distanz < 0.15). Sie ergeben sich automatisch aus der Datenstruktur und sind nicht thematisch vorgegeben. Die Cluster bilden die strukturelle Verwandtschaft auch in der 2D-Projektion ab, kein Cluster ist visuell verzerrt. Sportarten wie Marathon oder American Football, die strukturell zwar zu einem inhaltlichen Cluster passen würden (Physis bzw. Taktik), in der 2D-Karte aber weit von potenziellen Cluster-Partnern entfernt liegen, bleiben als Einzelgänger sichtbar.</p>

<p>Per Klick auf eine Kugel werden ihre Werte im Panel unter der Karte angezeigt; ein zweiter Klick auf eine andere Kugel ergänzt den strukturellen Vergleich.</p>

  <div class="tetra-wrap">
    <div class="mds-controls">
      <div class="mds-search-wrap">
        <input type="text" id="mds-search" class="mds-search" placeholder="Sportart suchen…" autocomplete="off" />
        <ul id="mds-search-suggestions" class="mds-search-suggestions"></ul>
      </div>
      <label class="tetra-toggle">
        <input type="checkbox" id="hull-toggle" checked />
        <span class="tetra-toggle-label">Cluster anzeigen</span>
      </label>
    </div>
    <div class="mds-canvas-wrap">
      <div id="mds-canvas" class="mds-canvas"></div>
      <button id="mds-reset-zoom" class="mds-reset-zoom" type="button" aria-label="Zoom zurücksetzen" title="Zoom zurücksetzen">⊙</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div id="comparison-panel" class="comparison-panel comparison-panel--empty" aria-live="polite">
    <p class="comparison-hint">Tippe eine Kugel in der Karte an, um ihre Werte zu sehen. Eine zweite Kugel zeigt den strukturellen Vergleich.</p>
  </div>
  <p class="figure-caption"><strong>Abb. 1</strong>Strukturkarte aller 50 bewerteten Sportarten im 7D-Profil. Per Pinch oder Mausrad zoombar.</p>


  </section>

  </article>
```

```{=html}
<script>
(function () {
  var root = document.documentElement;

  function currentMode() {
    var a = root.getAttribute('data-theme');
    return (a === 'light' || a === 'dark') ? a : 'auto';
  }
  function cycle(m) {
    if (m === 'auto')  return 'light';
    if (m === 'light') return 'dark';
    return 'auto';
  }
  var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
  var labels = { auto: 'Theme: Auto', light: 'Theme: Hell', dark: 'Theme: Dunkel' };
  function refreshLabel() { btn.textContent = labels[currentMode()]; }
  refreshLabel();
  btn.addEventListener('click', function () {
    var next = cycle(currentMode());
    if (next === 'auto') {
      root.removeAttribute('data-theme');
      try { localStorage.removeItem('theme'); } catch (e) {}
    } else {
      root.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
      try { localStorage.setItem('theme', next); } catch (e) {}
    }
    refreshLabel();
  });

  var sidebar  = document.getElementById('sidebar');
  var toggle   = document.getElementById('sidebar-toggle');
  var backdrop = document.getElementById('sidebar-backdrop');
  function open()  { sidebar.classList.add('open');  backdrop.classList.add('visible'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true'); }
  function close() { sidebar.classList.remove('open'); backdrop.classList.remove('visible'); toggle.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false'); }
  toggle.addEventListener('click', function () {
    if (sidebar.classList.contains('open')) close(); else open();
  });
  backdrop.addEventListener('click', close);
  document.addEventListener('keydown', function (e) {
    if (e.key === 'Escape' && sidebar.classList.contains('open')) close();
  });

  document.querySelectorAll('h2[id], h3[id], h4[id]').forEach(function (h) {
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = '#' + h.id;
    a.className = 'heading-anchor';
    a.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Link zu diesem Abschnitt');
    a.textContent = '#';
    h.insertBefore(a, h.firstChild);
  });

  function openTargetRow() {
    var hash = location.hash;
    if (!hash) return;
    var el = document.querySelector(hash);
    if (el && el.classList.contains('db-row')) {
      el.open = true;
    }
  }
  window.addEventListener('hashchange', openTargetRow);
  openTargetRow();
})();
</script>

[0.036636153487043695, 0.666615333974841], [0.04936182933531887, 0.700213690474736], [0.05748466952494718, 0.7292717310276774]]}, {"color": "#f4a82a", "label": "Ausdauer-Sport", "points": [[-0.4132192661512384, -0.49661360641444136], [-0.4013994921753247, -0.5120759234867075], [-0.385805189600413, -0.521228603084636], [-0.36752805601654887, -0.526011502758323], [-0.3479010293674911, [[0.047174553049303264, -0.4717235530241545], [0.06188551042289235, -0.47241681355081394], [0.08399639779700922, -0.46308795557948035], [0.11211216624414505, -0.446928936976275], [0.14518806125013803, -0.42628723495613785], [0.17987699387985115, -0.4003812016208399], [0.20771350519652498, -0.3726296068070732], [0.22650049712411002, -0.34833355522563336], [0.23577157985631791, -0.3275882646310668], [0.07484415269733888, -0.2939455264625131], [0.06046628901383888, -0.32970769142710327], [0.05061579220115903, -0.3695997614724479], [0.04426151725258416, -0.40607393817163323], [0.04019323219905821, -0.43674985866133964], [0.04035255316233796, -0.45948995170059587]]}, {"color": "#a32d2d", "label": "Maximalkraft", "points": [[0.38913217105815745, -0.3525896194478665], [0.3667772498647638, -0.34991148238292097], [0.349153931287869, -0.35506647372319766], [0.33475426811127684, -0.3656568462930668], [0.32231026882938685, -0.3792025360257778], [0.3117011454481669, -0.39422869087472734], [0.30439395539625147, -0.41054160797477796], [0.30308075471079665, -0.428856377898006], [0.3104238656660402, -0.4501400251700423], [0.32753498962410726, -0.4750432507179421], [0.3533846249474546, -0.5038041329278973], [0.38612875996506385, -0.5366835765565512], [0.4258316465895662, -0.5723421625935561], [0.4690770415157838, -0.6036101939059371], [0.508135119806777, -0.6286641898266658], [0.5417103113127467, -0.6478500832690474], [0.5696678289418424, -0.6593103805521335], [0.592022750135236, -0.661988517617079], [0.6096460687121308, -0.6568335262768024], [0.624045731888723, -0.6462431537069333], [0.636489731170613, -0.6326974639742221], [0.6470988545518328, -0.6176713091252727], [0.6544060446037485, -0.6013583920252221], [0.6557192452892033, -0.5830436221019941], [0.6483761343339598, -0.561759974829958], [0.6312650103758926, -0.536856749282058], [0.6054153750525453, -0.5080958670721029], [0.5726712400349361, -0.4752164234434489], [0.5329683534104337, -0.439557837406444], [0.4897229584842161, -0.408289806094063], [0.45066488019322287, -0.38323581017333413], [0.41708968868725316, -0.36404991673095266]]}];

const SVG_NS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg';
const container = document.getElementById('mds-canvas');
const panel = document.getElementById('comparison-panel');
const hullToggle = document.getElementById('hull-toggle');
const searchInput = document.getElementById('mds-search');

// === Viewbox-Setup ===
// nodeData.pos liegt in [-1, 1]. labelPos kann darüber hinausgehen.
// Wir berechnen die Bounding-Box aus allen Positionen + Margin.
function computeBounds() {
  let minX=Infinity, maxX=-Infinity, minY=Infinity, maxY=-Infinity;
  nodeData.forEach(n => {
    minX = Math.min(minX, n.pos[0], n.labelPos[0] - 0.15);
    maxX = Math.max(maxX, n.pos[0], n.labelPos[0] + 0.15);
    minY = Math.min(minY, n.pos[1], n.labelPos[1] - 0.03);
    maxY = Math.max(maxY, n.pos[1], n.labelPos[1] + 0.03);
  });
  hullData.forEach(h => {
    h.points.forEach(p => {
      minX = Math.min(minX, p[0]); maxX = Math.max(maxX, p[0]);
      minY = Math.min(minY, p[1]); maxY = Math.max(maxY, p[1]);
    });
  });
  const pad = 0.08;
  return { minX: minX-pad, maxX: maxX+pad, minY: minY-pad, maxY: maxY+pad };
}
const bounds = computeBounds();
const W = bounds.maxX - bounds.minX;
const H = bounds.maxY - bounds.minY;
// SVG-viewBox in eigenen Koordinaten
const VB_SCALE = 1000;
const VB_H = VB_SCALE * H/W;
function toSvgX(wx) { return (wx - bounds.minX) / W * VB_SCALE; }
function toSvgY(wy) { return (bounds.maxY - wy) / H * VB_SCALE; }  // Y umkehren (SVG ist top-down)
function toSvgR(wr) { return wr / Math.max(W, H) * VB_SCALE; }

const svg = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'svg');
const initialVB = { x: 0, y: 0, w: VB_SCALE, h: VB_H };
let vb = Object.assign({}, initialVB);
function applyViewBox() {
  svg.setAttribute('viewBox', `${vb.x} ${vb.y} ${vb.w} ${vb.h}`);
}
applyViewBox();
svg.setAttribute('xmlns', SVG_NS);
svg.setAttribute('class', 'mds-svg');
svg.style.width = '100%';
svg.style.height = 'auto';
svg.style.display = 'block';
svg.style.touchAction = 'none'; // verhindert Browser-Pan/Pinch auf Page-Ebene
container.appendChild(svg);

// === LAYER: Hüllen → Kanten → Kreise → Labels → Compare-Linie ===
const hullLayer = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'g');
hullLayer.setAttribute('class', 'mds-hulls');
const edgeLayer = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'g');
edgeLayer.setAttribute('class', 'mds-edges');
const compareLayer = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'g');
compareLayer.setAttribute('class', 'mds-compare');
const circleLayer = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'g');
circleLayer.setAttribute('class', 'mds-circles');
const labelLayer = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'g');
labelLayer.setAttribute('class', 'mds-labels');
svg.appendChild(hullLayer);
svg.appendChild(edgeLayer);
svg.appendChild(compareLayer);
svg.appendChild(circleLayer);
svg.appendChild(labelLayer);

// === HÜLLEN ===
function pointsToPath(points) {
  if (!points.length) return '';
  let d = `M ${toSvgX(points[0][0])} ${toSvgY(points[0][1])}`;
  for (let i = 1; i < points.length; i++) {
    d += ` L ${toSvgX(points[i][0])} ${toSvgY(points[i][1])}`;
  }
  return d + ' Z';
}
function buildHulls() {
  hullLayer.innerHTML = '';
  hullData.forEach(h => {
    const path = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'path');
    path.setAttribute('d', pointsToPath(h.points));
    path.setAttribute('fill', h.color);
    path.setAttribute('fill-opacity', '0.08');
    path.setAttribute('stroke', h.color);
    path.setAttribute('stroke-opacity', '0.25');
    path.setAttribute('stroke-width', '1.5');
    hullLayer.appendChild(path);
  });
}
buildHulls();

// === KANTEN ===
function buildEdges() {
  edgeLayer.innerHTML = '';
  const dmin = Math.min(...edgeData.map(e => e[2]));
  const dmax = Math.max(...edgeData.map(e => e[2]));
  edgeData.forEach(e => {
    const a = nodeData[e[0]], b = nodeData[e[1]];
    const line = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'line');
    line.setAttribute('x1', toSvgX(a.pos[0]));
    line.setAttribute('y1', toSvgY(a.pos[1]));
    line.setAttribute('x2', toSvgX(b.pos[0]));
    line.setAttribute('y2', toSvgY(b.pos[1]));
    line.setAttribute('class', 'mds-edge');
    const nz = dmax > dmin ? (e[2]-dmin)/(dmax-dmin) : 0;
    line.setAttribute('stroke-opacity', String(0.35 * (1 - nz*0.5)));
    edgeLayer.appendChild(line);
  });
}
buildEdges();

// === KREISE ===
const circleEls = []; // {circle, glow, index}
function buildCircles() {
  circleLayer.innerHTML = '';
  circleEls.length = 0;
  nodeData.forEach((n, i) => {
    // Glow (größerer transparenter Kreis dahinter)
    const glow = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'circle');
    glow.setAttribute('cx', toSvgX(n.pos[0]));
    glow.setAttribute('cy', toSvgY(n.pos[1]));
    glow.setAttribute('r', '14');
    glow.setAttribute('fill', n.color);
    glow.setAttribute('fill-opacity', '0.18');
    glow.setAttribute('class', 'mds-glow');
    glow.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
    circleLayer.appendChild(glow);

    const circle = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'circle');
    circle.setAttribute('cx', toSvgX(n.pos[0]));
    circle.setAttribute('cy', toSvgY(n.pos[1]));
    circle.setAttribute('r', '7');
    circle.setAttribute('fill', n.color);
    circle.setAttribute('class', 'mds-circle');
    circle.setAttribute('data-idx', i);
    circle.setAttribute('tabindex', '0');
    circle.setAttribute('role', 'button');
    circle.setAttribute('aria-label', n.name);
    circle.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    circleLayer.appendChild(circle);

    circleEls.push({ circle, glow, index: i });
  });
}
buildCircles();

// === LABELS ===
const labelEls = [];
function buildLabels() {
  labelLayer.innerHTML = '';
  labelEls.length = 0;
  nodeData.forEach((n, i) => {
    const px = toSvgX(n.pos[0]);
    const py = toSvgY(n.pos[1]);
    const lx = toSvgX(n.labelPos[0]);
    const ly = toSvgY(n.labelPos[1]);

    // Leader-Line (dezent, nur wenn Abstand groß)
    const dx = lx - px, dy = ly - py;
    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dy*dy);
    if (dist > 25) {
      const leader = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'line');
      leader.setAttribute('x1', px); leader.setAttribute('y1', py);
      leader.setAttribute('x2', lx); leader.setAttribute('y2', ly);
      leader.setAttribute('class', 'mds-leader');
      leader.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
      labelLayer.appendChild(leader);
    }

    // Anker bestimmen
    let anchor = 'start';
    if (Math.abs(dx) < 8) anchor = 'middle';
    else if (dx < 0) anchor = 'end';

    const text = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'text');
    text.setAttribute('x', lx);
    text.setAttribute('y', ly + 4);
    text.setAttribute('text-anchor', anchor);
    text.setAttribute('class', 'mds-label');
    text.setAttribute('data-idx', i);
    text.textContent = n.name;
    text.style.pointerEvents = 'none';
    labelLayer.appendChild(text);

    labelEls.push(text);
  });
}
buildLabels();

// === AUSWAHL-STATE ===
let selected = [];

function clearSelection() {
  selected = [];
  updateHighlights();
  setCompareLine(null);
  renderPanel();
}

function toggleSelect(idx) {
  const i = selected.indexOf(idx);
  if (i >= 0) {
    selected.splice(i, 1);
  } else {
    if (selected.length >= 2) selected.shift();
    selected.push(idx);
  }
  updateHighlights();
  setCompareLine(selected.length === 2 ? [selected[0], selected[1]] : null);
  renderPanel();
}

function updateHighlights() {
  const hasSel = selected.length > 0;
  circleEls.forEach((e, i) => {
    const isSel = selected.indexOf(i) >= 0;
    e.circle.setAttribute('r', isSel ? 11 : 7);
    e.circle.setAttribute('stroke', isSel ? 'currentColor' : 'none');
    e.circle.setAttribute('stroke-width', isSel ? 2 : 0);
    e.circle.setAttribute('fill-opacity', hasSel && !isSel ? 0.4 : 1);
    e.glow.setAttribute('r', isSel ? 22 : 14);
    e.glow.setAttribute('fill-opacity', isSel ? 0.35 : (hasSel ? 0.08 : 0.18));
  });
  labelEls.forEach((el, i) => {
    const isSel = selected.indexOf(i) >= 0;
    el.setAttribute('class', 'mds-label' + (isSel ? ' mds-label-selected' : '') + (hasSel && !isSel ? ' mds-label-dim' : ''));
  });
}

function setCompareLine(pair) {
  compareLayer.innerHTML = '';
  if (!pair) return;
  const a = nodeData[pair[0]], b = nodeData[pair[1]];
  const line = document.createElementNS(SVG_NS, 'line');
  line.setAttribute('x1', toSvgX(a.pos[0]));
  line.setAttribute('y1', toSvgY(a.pos[1]));
  line.setAttribute('x2', toSvgX(b.pos[0]));
  line.setAttribute('y2', toSvgY(b.pos[1]));
  line.setAttribute('class', 'mds-compare-line');
  compareLayer.appendChild(line);
}

// === PANEL ===
const COMP_LABEL = ['Taktik', 'Physis', 'Skill', 'Material'];
function getCompCssColor(idx) {
  const map = ['--tactics-color', '--physical-color', '--skill-color', '--material-color'];
  const v = getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue(map[idx]).trim();
  return v || '#888';
}
function renderPanel() {
  if (selected.length === 0) {
    panel.className = 'comparison-panel comparison-panel--empty';
    panel.innerHTML = '<p class="comparison-hint">Tippe eine Kugel in der Karte an, um ihre Werte zu sehen. Eine zweite Kugel zeigt den strukturellen Vergleich.</p>';
    return;
  }
  if (selected.length === 1) {
    const n = nodeData[selected[0]];
    let html = '<div class="cp-header">';
    html += '<span class="cp-sport"><span class="cp-dot" style="background:' + n.color + '"></span>' + n.name + '</span>';
    html += '<button class="cp-close" type="button" data-action="clear">Auswahl aufheben</button>';
    html += '</div>';
    for (let k = 0; k < 4; k++) {
      const pct = Math.round(n.c[k] * 100);
      if (pct === 0) continue;
      const color = getCompCssColor(k);
      html += '<div class="cp-single-row">';
      html += '<span class="cp-row-label">' + COMP_LABEL[k] + '</span>';
      html += '<div class="cp-bar-cell"><div class="cp-single-bar" style="width:' + pct + '%; background:' + color + '"></div></div>';
      html += '<span class="cp-single-val">' + pct + '%</span>';
      html += '</div>';
    }
    panel.className = 'comparison-panel comparison-panel--single';
    panel.innerHTML = html;
  } else {
    const a = nodeData[selected[0]], b = nodeData[selected[1]];
    const d = distMatrix[selected[0]][selected[1]];
    let dLabel = 'mittel';
    if (d < 0.15) dLabel = 'sehr nah';
    else if (d < 0.30) dLabel = 'nah';
    else if (d < 0.50) dLabel = 'mittel';
    else if (d < 0.70) dLabel = 'weit';
    else dLabel = 'sehr weit';
    let html = '<div class="cp-header">';
    html += '<span class="cp-sport"><span class="cp-dot" style="background:' + a.color + '"></span>' + a.name + '</span>';
    html += '<span class="cp-vs">vs</span>';
    html += '<span class="cp-sport"><span class="cp-dot" style="background:' + b.color + '"></span>' + b.name + '</span>';
    html += '<button class="cp-close" type="button" data-action="clear">Schließen</button>';
    html += '</div>';
    html += '<p class="cp-distance">Strukturelle Distanz: <strong>' + d.toFixed(2) + '</strong><span class="cp-d-label">' + dLabel + '</span></p>';
    html += '<div class="cp-comparison">';
    for (let k = 0; k < 4; k++) {
      const va = Math.round(a.c[k] * 100), vb = Math.round(b.c[k] * 100);
      if (va === 0 && vb === 0) continue;
      const diff = Math.abs(va - vb);
      const aligned = diff <= 5 ? ' cp-aligned' : '';
      html += '<span class="cp-row-label">' + COMP_LABEL[k] + '</span>';
      html += '<div class="cp-bar-cell' + aligned + '">';
      html += '<div class="cp-bar" style="width:' + va + '%; background:' + a.color + '" title="' + a.name + ': ' + va + '%"></div>';
      html += '<div class="cp-bar cp-bar-b" style="width:' + vb + '%; background:' + b.color + '" title="' + b.name + ': ' + vb + '%"></div>';
      html += '</div>';
      const diffClass = diff >= 15 ? ' cp-diff-strong' : '';
      html += '<span class="cp-diff' + diffClass + '">' + (diff === 0 ? '–' : 'Δ ' + diff) + '</span>';
    }
    html += '</div>';
    panel.className = 'comparison-panel comparison-panel--pair';
    panel.innerHTML = html;
  }
  const btn = panel.querySelector('[data-action="clear"]');
  if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', clearSelection);
}
renderPanel();

// === KLICK-EVENTS ===
svg.addEventListener('click', e => {
  if (!e.target.closest('.mds-circle') && !dragMoved && selected.length > 0) clearSelection();
});

// === TOGGLE ===
if (hullToggle) {
  hullToggle.addEventListener('change', () => {
    hullLayer.style.display = hullToggle.checked ? '' : 'none';
  });
}

// === SUCHE ===
if (searchInput) {
  const searchSuggestions = document.getElementById('mds-search-suggestions');
  searchInput.addEventListener('input', () => {
    const q = searchInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!q) { if (searchSuggestions) searchSuggestions.innerHTML = ''; return; }
    const matches = nodeData
      .map((n, i) => ({ n, i }))
      .filter(({n}) => n.name.toLowerCase().includes(q))
      .slice(0, 6);
    if (searchSuggestions) {
      searchSuggestions.innerHTML = matches.map(({n, i}) =>
        `<li data-idx="${i}"><span class="ss-dot" style="background:${n.color}"></span>${n.name}</li>`
      ).join('');
    }
  });
  searchInput.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
      const q = searchInput.value.trim().toLowerCase();
      const first = nodeData.findIndex(n => n.name.toLowerCase().includes(q));
      if (first >= 0) {
        toggleSelect(first);
        searchInput.value = '';
        if (searchSuggestions) searchSuggestions.innerHTML = '';
      }
    }
  });
  if (searchSuggestions) {
    searchSuggestions.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const li = e.target.closest('li');
      if (li) {
        const idx = parseInt(li.getAttribute('data-idx'));
        toggleSelect(idx);
        searchInput.value = '';
        searchSuggestions.innerHTML = '';
      }
    });
  }
}

// === ZOOM und PAN ===
const MIN_ZOOM = 1.0;
const MAX_ZOOM = 8.0;
function currentZoom() { return VB_SCALE / vb.w; }
function clientToSvg(clientX, clientY) {
  const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
  const sx = vb.x + (clientX - rect.left) / rect.width * vb.w;
  const sy = vb.y + (clientY - rect.top) / rect.height * vb.h;
  return { x: sx, y: sy };
}
function zoomBy(factor, anchorX, anchorY) {
  const newZoom = Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, Math.max(MIN_ZOOM, currentZoom() * factor));
  const newW = VB_SCALE / newZoom;
  const newH = VB_H / newZoom;
  vb.x = anchorX - (anchorX - vb.x) * (newW / vb.w);
  vb.y = anchorY - (anchorY - vb.y) * (newH / vb.h);
  vb.w = newW;
  vb.h = newH;
  vb.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(VB_SCALE - vb.w, vb.x));
  vb.y = Math.max(0, Math.min(VB_H - vb.h, vb.y));
  applyViewBox();
}
function resetZoom() {
  vb = Object.assign({}, initialVB);
  applyViewBox();
}

// Mausrad-Zoom — viel sanfter, mit Deltagröße proportional
svg.addEventListener('wheel', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  const anchor = clientToSvg(e.clientX, e.clientY);
  // deltaY-Magnitude in Faktor umrechnen: kleine Bewegung = kleiner Zoom-Schritt
  // Trackpads liefern oft Werte um 1-5, Mauseräder 50-150
  // Wir normalisieren auf einen sanften Exponentialfaktor
  const delta = Math.max(-50, Math.min(50, e.deltaY));
  const factor = Math.exp(-delta * 0.003); // 0.003 macht Wheel-Tick (~50) etwa 1.16, kleines Trackpad (~5) etwa 1.015
  zoomBy(factor, anchor.x, anchor.y);
}, { passive: false });

// Pointer-basierte Pan + Pinch
// WICHTIG: Pan-Drag wird nur initialisiert, wenn NICHT auf einem Kreis gestartet wurde.
const pointers = new Map();
let pinchStartDist = 0;
let pinchStartZoom = 1;
let pinchAnchor = null;
let dragStart = null;
let dragMoved = false;
let dragStartedOnCircle = false;

svg.addEventListener('pointerdown', e => {
  // Auf einem Kreis: KEIN Pan, Click-Event übernimmt
  const onCircle = !!e.target.closest('.mds-circle');
  pointers.set(e.pointerId, { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
  if (pointers.size === 1) {
    dragStartedOnCircle = onCircle;
    if (!onCircle) {
      // Pointer-Capture nur bei Pan-Start auf leerer Fläche
      svg.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId);
      dragStart = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY, vbX: vb.x, vbY: vb.y };
      dragMoved = false;
    }
  } else if (pointers.size === 2) {
    // Pinch — funktioniert immer, auch wenn auf Kreis gestartet
    try { svg.setPointerCapture(e.pointerId); } catch(_) {}
    const pts = Array.from(pointers.values());
    pinchStartDist = Math.hypot(pts[0].x - pts[1].x, pts[0].y - pts[1].y);
    pinchStartZoom = currentZoom();
    const cx = (pts[0].x + pts[1].x) / 2;
    const cy = (pts[0].y + pts[1].y) / 2;
    pinchAnchor = clientToSvg(cx, cy);
    dragStart = null;
  }
});
svg.addEventListener('pointermove', e => {
  if (!pointers.has(e.pointerId)) return;
  pointers.set(e.pointerId, { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY });
  if (pointers.size === 2 && pinchAnchor) {
    const pts = Array.from(pointers.values());
    const dist = Math.hypot(pts[0].x - pts[1].x, pts[0].y - pts[1].y);
    if (pinchStartDist > 0) {
      const targetZoom = Math.min(MAX_ZOOM, Math.max(MIN_ZOOM, pinchStartZoom * (dist / pinchStartDist)));
      const ratio = targetZoom / currentZoom();
      zoomBy(ratio, pinchAnchor.x, pinchAnchor.y);
    }
  } else if (pointers.size === 1 && dragStart) {
    const dx = e.clientX - dragStart.x;
    const dy = e.clientY - dragStart.y;
    if (Math.hypot(dx, dy) > 4) dragMoved = true;
    const rect = svg.getBoundingClientRect();
    const svgDx = dx / rect.width * vb.w;
    const svgDy = dy / rect.height * vb.h;
    vb.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(VB_SCALE - vb.w, dragStart.vbX - svgDx));
    vb.y = Math.max(0, Math.min(VB_H - vb.h, dragStart.vbY - svgDy));
    applyViewBox();
  }
});
function endPointer(e) {
  pointers.delete(e.pointerId);
  if (pointers.size < 2) {
    pinchStartDist = 0;
    pinchAnchor = null;
  }
  if (pointers.size === 0) {
    dragStart = null;
  }
}
svg.addEventListener('pointerup', endPointer);
svg.addEventListener('pointercancel', endPointer);

// Reset-Button
const resetBtn = document.getElementById('mds-reset-zoom');
if (resetBtn) resetBtn.addEventListener('click', resetZoom);

// Click-Handler: separat von Pointer-Logik, normales DOM-Click
// SVG fängt es nur ab, wenn nicht gedraggt wurde und nicht auf einem Kreis
circleLayer.addEventListener('click', e => {
  // Wenn vorher gedraggt → ignorieren
  if (dragMoved) { dragMoved = false; return; }
  const t = e.target.closest('.mds-circle');
  if (t) {
    const idx = parseInt(t.getAttribute('data-idx'));
    toggleSelect(idx);
  }
});

})();
</script>

```
